lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਤੂੰ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਹਮਰੈ ਵਸਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: tan dhan teraa toon prabh meraa hamarai vas kichh naeh |
lines.english: My body and wealth are Yours; You are my God - nothing is in my power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਕਰਹੁ ਕਿਰਮ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕਉ ਇਹੈ ਮਨੋਰਥੁ ਸੁਆਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: deaa karahu kiram apune kau ihai manorath suaau |2|
lines.english: Please, be kind to me - I am just a worm. This is my object and purpose. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਿਉ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਤਿਉ ਤਿਉ ਰਹਣਾ ਤੇਰਾ ਦੀਆ ਖਾਹਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jiau jiau raakheh tiau tiau rahanaa teraa deea khaeh |3|
lines.english: As You keep me, so do I live; I eat what You give me. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੇ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਕਾਟੈ ਮਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਧੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: janam janam ke kilavikh kaattai majan har jan dhoor |
lines.english: The sins of countless incarnations are washed away, by bathing in the dust of the Lord's humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਇ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਰਮ ਭਉ ਨਾਸੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਦਾ ਹਜੂਰਿ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੩੯॥
lines.translit: bhaae bhagat bharam bhau naasai har naanak sadaa hajoor |4|4|139|
lines.english: By loving devotional worship, doubt and fear depart; O Nanak, the Lord is Ever-present. ||4||4||139||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਧਾਰੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਬਖਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aap kripaal kripaa prabh dhaaree satigur bakhasiaa har naam |1|
lines.english: The Merciful Lord God has bestowed His Mercy, and the True Guru has granted the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਦਰਸੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar daras teraa so paae jis masatak bhaag |
lines.english: The Blessed Vision of Your Darshan is unapproachable and incomprehensible; he alone obtains it, who has such good destiny recorded upon his forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਜੁਗੁ ਉਧਾਰਿਆ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: kalijug udhaariaa guradev |
lines.english: The Divine Guru is the Saving Grace in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਲ ਮੂਤ ਮੂੜ ਜਿ ਮੁਘਦ ਹੋਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਲਗੇ ਤੇਰੀ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mal moot moorr ji mughad hote sabh lage teree sev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Even those fools and idiots, stained with feces and urine, have all taken to Your service. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭ ਸ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਧਰਤਾ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: too aap karataa sabh srisatt dharataa sabh meh rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: You Yourself are the Creator, who established the entire world. You are contained in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਜੁਗੁ ਤ੍ਰੇਤਾ ਦੁਆਪਰੁ ਭਣੀਐ ਕਲਿਜੁਗੁ ਊਤਮੋ ਜੁਗਾ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: satajug tretaa duaapar bhaneeai kalijug aootamo jugaa maeh |
lines.english: The Golden Age of Sat Yuga, the Silver Age of Trayta Yuga, and the Brass Age of Dwaapar Yuga are good; but the best is the Dark Age, the Iron Age, of Kali Yuga.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਰਾਜਾ ਬਿਸਮਾਦੁ ਹੋਆ ਸਭ ਪਈ ਪੈਰੀ ਆਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dharam raajaa bisamaad hoaa sabh pee pairee aae |2|
lines.english: The Righteous Judge of Dharma is wonder-struck, at the sight of everyone falling at the Lord's Feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿ ਕਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਅਹਿ ਕਰੁ ਪਾਏ ਕੋਈ ਨ ਪਕੜੀਐ ਕਿਸੈ ਥਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: eh kar kare su eh kar paae koee na pakarreeai kisai thaae |3|
lines.english: As we act, so are the rewards we receive; no one can take the place of another. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਹਿ ਜਿ ਭਗਤ ਤੇਰੇ ਜਾਚਹਿ ਏਹੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਬਿਰਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo soee kareh ji bhagat tere jaacheh ehu teraa birad |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, whatever Your devotees ask for, You do. This is Your Way, Your very nature.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰ ਜੋੜਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਨੁ ਮਾਗੈ ਅਪਣਿਆ ਸੰਤਾ ਦੇਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਸੁ ॥੪॥੫॥੧੪੦॥
lines.translit: kar jorr naanak daan maagai apaniaa santaa dehi har daras |4|5|140|
lines.english: With my palms pressed together, O Nanak, I beg for this gift; Lord, please bless Your Saints with Your Vision. ||4||5||140||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਘਰੁ ੧੩ ॥
lines.translit: raag aasaa mahalaa 5 ghar 13 |
lines.english: Raag Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Thirteenth House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਬਿਖਾਦੀ ਦੁਸਟ ਅਪਵਾਦੀ ਤੇ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਸੰਗਾਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: mahaa bikhaadee dusatt apavaadee te puneet sangaare |1|
lines.english: Even the most argumentative, vicious and indecent people, have been purified in Your company. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਚਨ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bachan tumaare |
lines.english: O True Guru, by Your Words,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: niragun nisataare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: even the worthless have been saved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਭਵੰਤੇ ਨਰਕਿ ਪੜੰਤੇ ਤਿਨੑ ਕੇ ਕੁਲ ਉਧਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: janam bhavante narak parrante tina ke kul udhaare |2|
lines.english: Those who have wandered in reincarnation, and those who have been consigned to hell - even their families have been redeemed. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਨੈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮਾਨੈ ਸੇ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹਰਿ ਦੁਆਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: koe na jaanai koe na maanai se paragatt har duaare |3|
lines.english: Those whom no one knew, and those whom no one respected - even they have become famous and respected at the Court of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਉਪਮਾ ਦੇਉ ਕਵਨ ਵਡਾਈ ਨਾਨਕ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਵਾਰੇ ॥੪॥੧॥੧੪੧॥
lines.translit: kavan upamaa deo kavan vaddaaee naanak khin khin vaare |4|1|141|
lines.english: What praise, and what greatness should I attribute to You? Nanak is a sacrifice to You, each and every moment. ||4||1||141||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਵਰ ਸੋਇ ਰਹੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baavar soe rahe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The crazy people are asleep. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਬਿਖੈ ਰਸ ਮਾਤੇ ਮਿਥਿਆ ਗਹਨ ਗਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: moh kuttanb bikhai ras maate mithiaa gehan gahe |1|
lines.english: They are intoxicated with attachment to their families and sensory pleasures; they are held in the grip of falsehood. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਥਨ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਸੁਪਨ ਆਨੰਦ ਉਲਾਸ ਮਨਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਸਤਿ ਕਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mithan manorath supan aanand ulaas man mukh sat kahe |2|
lines.english: The false desires, and the dream-like delights and pleasures - these, the self-willed manmukhs call true. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਸੰਗੇ ਤਿਲੁ ਮਰਮੁ ਨ ਲਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: amrit naam padaarath sange til maram na lahe |3|
lines.english: The wealth of the Ambrosial Naam, the Name of the Lord, is with them, but they do not find even a tiny bit of its mystery. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਤਿਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 tipade |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Thi-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਰਾਖੇ ਸਤਸੰਗੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਆਹੇ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੪੨॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa raakhe satasange naanak saran aahe |4|2|142|
lines.english: By Your Grace, O Lord, You save those, who take to the Sanctuary of the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. ||4||2||142||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹਾ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਪਿਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ohaa prem piree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I seek the Love of my Beloved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜ ਨ ਭਾਗ ਨ ਹੁਕਮ ਨ ਸਾਦਨ ॥ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਨ ਚਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raaj na bhaag na hukam na saadan | kichh kichh na chaahee |2|
lines.english: Imperial power, fortunes, royal command and mansions - I have no desire for these. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਨਿਕ ਮਾਣਿਕ ਗਜ ਮੋਤੀਅਨ ਲਾਲਨ ਨਹ ਨਾਹ ਨਹੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kanik maanik gaj moteean laalan neh naah nahee |1|
lines.english: Gold, jewels, giant pearls and rubies - I have no need for them. ||1||
